---
pagetitle: "Contact | Mesfin Genie"
description: "Contact Dr Mesfin Genie for research collaboration, supervision enquiries, and speaking, with verified academic and professional profiles."
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell">
<p class="eyebrow">Contact</p>
<h1>Contact and collaboration</h1>
<p>Continuing Senior Lecturer in Health Economics, Newcastle Business School, The University of Newcastle, Australia.</p>
</div></header>

<section class="content-section"><div class="page-shell narrow">

<h2>Get in touch</h2>
<p>The best way to reach me is by email: <a href="mailto:mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au">mesfin.genie@newcastle.edu.au</a>. My institutional profile is maintained by the University of Newcastle.</p>

<h2>I am glad to hear about</h2>
<ul class="cv-list">
<li>Research collaboration in health economics, discrete choice experiments, eye tracking, and health policy.</li>
<li>Supervision enquiries from prospective PhD and MPhil students (see the <a href="/supervision/">supervision page</a> for what to include).</li>
<li>Invitations to speak on health-preference research, behavioural economics, and decision-support tools.</li>
<li>Questions about the decision-support <a href="/tools/">tools</a>.</li>
</ul>

<h2>Profiles</h2>
<ul class="cv-list">
<li><a href="https://www.newcastle.edu.au/profile/mesfin-genie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">University of Newcastle profile</a></li>
<li><a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=v2SXM_kAAAAJ&hl=en" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Google Scholar</a></li>
<li><a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-1744-4666" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ORCID</a></li>
<li><a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Mesfin-Genie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">ResearchGate</a></li>
<li><a href="https://au.linkedin.com/in/mesfin-genie-ph-d-65634216" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">LinkedIn</a></li>
<li><a href="https://github.com/DrGenie" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">GitHub</a></li>
</ul>

</div></section>
```
